---
title: "Garrett M. Shipley"
about:
  template: solana
  image: images/profile.jpg
  links: 
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=BnWtlvUAAAAJ&hl=en&inst=9897619243961157265
    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}} ORCID"
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-0444-0367
    - text: "{{< fa file-pdf >}} CV"
      href: https://github.com/garth74/vita/raw/main/vita.pdf

---

## About Me

TODO
